hero.headline: Frontend Engineer
hero.description: Building scalable web applications, business systems, and AI-assisted solutions with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern development practices.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: Frontend Engineer with Full-Stack Capabilities
about.p1: I'm a Frontend Engineer focused on building scalable web applications, business systems, and modern digital products.
about.p2: My primary expertise is creating responsive, accessible, and intuitive user experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern frontend technologies. Beyond the frontend, I also work across the stack, integrating APIs, databases, and business processes to deliver complete solutions.
about.p3: I enjoy transforming complex requirements into maintainable, production-ready applications that create real value.
about.lets_connect: Let's connect or just say Hi

footer.title: Let's talk or build awesome things together!
footer.desc: I'm actively seeking opportunities as a Frontend Engineer. Feel free to reach out to me for collaborations, inquiries, or just to say hello.
